item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Fish fritters served with oven-baked potatoes,home-pickled cucumber salad and remoulade with crispy fennel-apple salad

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Peruvian beef patty in casserole with sauteedvegetables and fried potato/beet root cake, topped with herbs. Hereto AjiAmarillo sauce on the side Green dish: Peruvian pea protein patty in casserole with sauteedvegetables and fried potato/beet root cake, topped with herbs. Hereto AjiAmarillo sauce on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Kebab with tender spiced meat, fresh tomatoes, crisp lettuce, pickled cabbageand red onions, finished with parsley and creamy sour cream dressing. Served inwarm flatbread GREEN DISH: Crisp falafel with the same fresh accompaniments and creamy dressing, served inwarm flatbread Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. Lunch 11 a.m. — 2 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. Slagtehusgade 11, 2. sal DK-1715 København V CVR: 40909109 Kay Fiskers Pl. 102 300 København +45 31 10 05 58

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Crisp pork belly sandwich layered with tender meat, pickled cabbage and redonions, mustard mayo and fresh cucumber salad GREEN DISH: Grilled halloumi sandwich with golden crust and soft centre, served withpickled cabbage, red onions, mustard mayo and cucumber salad Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. Lunch 11 a.m. — 2 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. Slagtehusgade 11, 2. sal DK-1715 København V CVR: 40909109 Kay Fiskers Pl. 102 300 København +45 31 10 05 58

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Nordic Pulledpork served with pita bread and crispycoleslaw, pickled chili topped with fresh herbs Green dish: Nordic falafel made with green peas served with pitabread and crispy coleslaw, pickled chili topped with fresh herbs Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. Lunch 11 a.m. — 2 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. Slagtehusgade 11, 2. sal DK-1715 København V CVR: 40909109 Kay Fiskers Pl. 102 300 København +45 31 10 05 58
